title: senecio dolichocephalus
intro: Senecio dolichocephalus, also known as the Grey Groundsel, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its bitter and slightly toxic compounds called pyrrolizidine alkaloids, which have been shown to have hepatoprotective and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Senecio dolichocephalus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and protect the liver from damage. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support liver health and alleviate digestive issues, however, caution is advised due to its toxic compounds and potential side effects.
